_meta.title: Definitive Consensus Ruleset
_meta.description: Production-ready execution logic. Version 1.5 resolves filter-mismatches between the GUM memos and the Action Board. It adds the R9 Specialty route, removes 100%-negative strategies (Sup3335, Tri variants) to the retired list, adds PPR safety gates to R8, and explicitly flags R4 strategies for pre-deployment validation.

core_truth.on_normal_mean: ZERO strategies have a positive normal mean at any runner count (Sup12L3 has a +$0.12 blanket mean, but this is entirely jackpot-driven; no strategy has a positive normal mean excluding top-1% wins). All profitability is outlier-driven. The edge is structural (public under-betting specific pockets) not distributional.
core_truth.on_the_mission: Find conditions where the public systematically mis-prices the pool, position in those conditions, and absorb the losing streaks until the outlier pays.
core_truth.on_filters: Filters do not create edge; they remove the noise that buries it.

live_bot_config.description: Distilled trigger logic for live execution. Evaluates sequentially: Universal Gates -> Strategy Routing -> Strategy-Specific Gates.

universal_gates.description: ALL must evaluate to TRUE before any strategy is considered. Fail any one = NO BET.

conditions.note: fghtY doubles losses on expensive superfectas.
Races 1 and 2 have cold pools and noisy signals.
Absolute floor. Below 2.0 is a 100% chalk trap. Specific routes have higher floors.
SI 7.0+ is an extreme chaos black hole (-$1,138 in gauntlet).
R13+ is a combinatorial black hole.
Two-pass Chalk evaluation: Exclude chalk globally, EXCEPT for R6 races which are allowed through to routing specifically so Sup3214 can evaluate them.
The Public Staircase. Parse sequence as array of integers. Exclude only when both 1st and 2nd finishing positions are occupied by ML horses 1 and 2.

approved_strategies.note: WARNING: Board shows D-MONITOR tier — filter-mismatch suspected. Validate with action_board_allpurse run at R4-only cluster before live deployment.
WARNING: Board shows D-MONITOR tier — filter-mismatch suspected. Validate before live deployment.
WARNING: Board shows D-MONITOR tier — filter-mismatch suspected. Validate before live deployment.
Cornerstone $2 ticket. Uniquely benefits from chalk inclusion at R6. (Chalk=Y allowed here via Universal Gate exception).
Volume anchor. Absorbs losing streaks without catastrophic drawdown. Must explicitly reject R6 Chalk.
MANDATORY PURSE CAP. Without <=32k cap, R6 exposure is catastrophic (-$20,545). Must explicitly reject R6 Chalk.

trigger_conditions.note: 2.5 intentionally lower than other routes; PPR<=4.0 gate is doing the primary filtering work at R7.

approved_strategies.note: Highest absolute payout pocket. Best cell = +$16,815.
Strong large-field player. R10 at $9-12k PPR is its confirmed zone.
GUM Tier 1 validated. +$7,739 (2025) / +$708 (2026). The only known Tier 1 play with no route.
Min_JK 0.86 and Tier A. Second-strongest non-Supr1445 Tier A entry in the board.

advanced_target_signatures.description: Specific structural patterns to monitor for outsized value. These bypass standard routing if detected.
advanced_target_signatures.bypass_note: Bypass applies to ROUTE selection only. Universal gates still apply unconditionally before any archetype bet is placed.

archetypes.note: Highest Sharpe in the Archetype engine. MONITORING ONLY (N=3 hits). Not suitable for capital allocation until >=10 confirmed hits.
Collapse_Four. MaxDD = $0. Every single execution was net positive. hit_only caveat applies — it's a monitoring signal, same as 2-S-3-L.

post_position_sequences.note: Last post winning first with favorite placing produces near-empty ticket pools.
Top value-score in R7. $12k median is 10x the R6 equivalent.

retired_strategies.description: Strategies permanently removed from production due to mathematical impossibility, out-of-sample failure, or unmanageable risk.

catastrophic_exposure.reason: Requires strict <=32k purse cap at R6-R7 to avoid -$15,405 drawdowns. Retired to simplify routing and eliminate catastrophic exposure risk.
